All about Tamine Sarmaye PropFirm

In the dynamic landscape of global financial markets, particularly the Forex market, access to sufficient capital has always been one of the main obstacles for traders, especially Iranian traders. In this context, Proprietary Trading Firms (Prop Firms) have emerged as a novel solution. These firms, by providing capital to qualified traders, enable them to trade […]

All about Crypto Fund Trader (CFT)

Introduction: Overview of Crypto Fund Trader Crypto Fund Trader (CFT) is a proprietary trading firm established in 2022 in Zug, Switzerland. The platform enables traders to manage virtual funds up to $300,000 in a simulated environment, with a primary focus on cryptocurrencies and integration with the Bybit exchange. Comprehensive Review of Traders Combat: Accounts, Rules, and Platforms

If you’re a trader looking to scale your skills without risking personal capital, Traders Combat is a name you’ve likely come across. Launched in July 2022, this Iranian proprietary trading firm (prop firm) offers skilled traders the chance to trade with the firm’s capital and share profits. With a focus on the Iranian trading community, Traders Combat stands out for its customizable trading challenges, Persian-language support, and a dedicated broker designed to cater to traders’ needs. Whether you’re a scalper, swing trader, or algo trader, this platform aims to provide the tools and flexibility to align with your trading style.
Read
more
2 weeks ago

Proprietary trading firms (prop firms) allow traders to trade with the firm’s capital and earn a share of the profits. Critical Tips Before Choosing ZoraFX

ZoraFX is a trading platform that offers both proprietary trading (prop trading) and brokerage services. It is the new international brand of LastProp, an Iranian prop trading firm, aimed at providing a unified and professional platform for traders worldwide. ZoraFX emphasizes top-tier security, full transparency, near-instant withdrawals, and 24/7 expert support in multiple languages, including […]

Read
more
2 weeks ago

Steps for selecting a prop firm

Step 1
First, you need to consider your trading style and strategy as well as the market you intend to trade in, and review your suitable prop firms.
Step 3
Reputable companies are transparent; avoid paperwork where the identity of the CEO, owners, and their office address cannot be verified or is unrealistic.
Step 5
After purchasing an account and participating in prop trading exams, try to stay away from social media and news related to prop trading, and focus solely on your trades, away from distractions.
1
2
3
4
5
6
Step 2
Read the ratings and reviews posted by users of the relevant companies and avoid companies that register fake reviews for themselves.
Step 4
Simple and overly risky rules, high prices, and high percentage discount codes are things that analytical-minded traders should be suspicious of; avoid such companies.
Step 6
In financial markets, there are many advertisements and marketing methods facing traders. Recording your experiences with companies on Fundfa will be a significant barrier for fraudulent companies.

Why Fundfa?!

“Fandfa is a comprehensive reference for reviewing and comparing prop firms. We help traders make the best decisions by providing accurate and unbiased information. Our goal is transparency, trust, and facilitating the process of choosing a prop firm for you. If you are looking for an informed and professional choice, Fandfa is here to illuminate the path for you.

Access everything in one place: prop firms, regulations, analyses, and user experiences are all gathered on a comprehensive platform.
Professional neutrality: We have no business ties with prop firms, and our goal is solely to provide honest and practical information.
Helping your growth: Choosing the right prop firm can have a significant impact on your success in trading, and we make this path easier for you.”

Fundfa does not endorse or reject any company, and all the information available on Fundfa is collected from the companies’ websites and the opinions of their users.
